secondary_cross_current: Risk-on relief with selective breadth improvement
top_actions: Establish the inaugural model portfolio with four funded index exposures and meaningful cash optionality.
Favor U.S. large-cap and tech leadership over a broader global build-out at inception.
Keep Japan and Germany on the live watchlist pending cleaner confirmation and fresher implementation verification.

recommended_changes.reason: Core U.S. large-cap exposure remains the cleanest starting anchor.
Growth leadership remains a core engine in the current opportunity set.
Domestic breadth improves diversification without dominating the book.
Emerging markets add a measured non-U.S. risk sleeve while the dollar backdrop is less hostile.

continuity.next_change_trigger: Cleaner confirmation in Japan or Europe broadens the funded opportunity set next run.
